products.title: Choose your performance level

edge.name: Edge
edge.description: Compact desktop appliance for individuals and small teams. Excellent for 7B–13B models with high-speed local inference.

studio.name: Studio
studio.description: Powerful tower for teams. Handles up to 70B models, collaborative RAG, and production workloads with ease.

forge.name: Forge
forge.description: Enterprise-grade system for large organizations. Massive scale inference, fine-tuning, and multi-node ready.

products.blurb: All appliances include our private inference engine and come pre-loaded with leading open-source models.

why.privacyDesc: Nothing leaves your premises. Perfect for regulated industries and sensitive IP.
why.latencyDesc: Run inference at the edge or in your data center. No network round-trips to the cloud.
why.costsDesc: One-time hardware purchase. No surprise token bills or usage-based pricing.
why.controlDesc: Choose any open-source model, fine-tune freely, and integrate with your existing stack.

custom.title: Need a custom configuration?
custom.subtitle: Contact our team for tailored enterprise quotes and volume pricing.

about.title: Our story
about.subtitle: High-performance private AI appliances, built by engineers who have spent their careers scaling some of the largest computing systems in the world.
about.missionText: Generative AI will change everything. But the most important models and the most sensitive data should not have to live in someone else's cloud. We build appliances that give serious European organizations the power of giant HPC clusters with complete ownership, privacy, and control.
about.founderP1: With more than twenty years building complex distributed systems — from large-scale Java platforms and team leadership to architecting a new distributed web search engine and high-frequency trading systems using C++ and machine learning — performance at scale has always been central to the work.
about.founderP2: He currently helps design and operate some of the largest HPC clusters on the planet for a major industry player. At the same time, he is convinced that generative AI will fundamentally reshape every industry — and that the most important models and data should not have to live in someone else's cloud.
about.founderP3: That conviction is why we built these appliances. Our Edge, Studio and Forge models bring HPC-grade inference performance into turnkey systems you can deploy in your own infrastructure in minutes. Optional Managed Care and SecureVault Backup services let your team focus on models and results instead of operations.
about.whyText: Cloud convenience comes at a cost: data leaves your control, latency kills real-time use cases, costs become unpredictable, and true European sovereignty is hard to achieve.
whyList: Complete data sovereignty — your models and data never leave your premises
Predictable costs — one-time hardware purchase, no token or usage bills
Ultra-low latency — inference at the edge or in your data center
HPC performance made simple — the power of giant clusters in appliances you own

footer.copyright: © {year} {brand} — Private generative AI infrastructure for Europe

checkout.vatInclusiveExplanation: VAT will be charged by the supplier and added to the total. This election is only available when not prohibited by mandatory reverse charge or other legal rules.

checkout.concurrentReq: VIES service is currently overloaded (maximum number of concurrent requests reached). This error (MS_MAX_CONCURRENT_REQ) occurs frequently, especially for French (FR) VAT numbers due to high traffic on the national system. Please try again in a few minutes. You can also validate manually via the official VIES portal or batch tool if needed.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.operatorText: This website is operated by {companyName}, a private limited company incorporated in Estonia.
legal.liabilityText1: The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep the information up to date and correct, we make no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, suitability, or availability of the website or the information contained herein.
legal.liabilityText2: To the maximum extent permitted by law, {companyName} shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or in connection with the use of this website or the inability to use it.
legal.liabilityText3: Nothing in these legal notices excludes or limits our liability for death or personal injury caused by our negligence, or for fraud or fraudulent misrepresentation.
legal.intellectualPropertyText: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of {companyName} or its content suppliers and is protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written permission.
legal.governingLawText: These Legal Notices shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Estonia. Any dispute arising out of or in connection with these notices shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Estonia.
legal.disputeResolutionText: We encourage you to contact us first to resolve any issues amicably. If a dispute cannot be resolved informally, it may be submitted to the competent courts in Estonia.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introductionText: {companyName} (“we”, “us”, or “our”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.
privacy.dataControllerText: The data controller responsible for your personal data is {companyName}, registered in Estonia. You can contact us at {contactEmail}.
privacy.dataWeCollectText: We may collect the following types of information:
dataWeCollectList: Personal identification information (name, email address, company name, VAT number)
Contact and billing information (address, phone number, payment details)
Technical data (IP address, browser type, device information, cookies)
Usage data (how you interact with our website and configurator)
privacy.howWeUseDataText: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
howWeUseDataList: To process and fulfill your orders
To provide customer support and manage your account
To improve our website, products, and services
To send you important updates, invoices, and service-related communications
To comply with legal obligations (including tax and anti-money laundering requirements)
privacy.legalBasisText: We process your personal data based on one or more of the following legal grounds:
legalBasisList: Performance of a contract (when you place an order)
Legitimate interest (improving our services, marketing, fraud prevention)
Your consent (for marketing communications and certain cookies)
privacy.dataSharingText: We may share your information with trusted third parties, including:
dataSharingList: Government authorities when required by law
privacy.dataSharingNote: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.dataRetentionText: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, or as required by law (for example, accounting and tax records are typically kept for 7 years).
privacy.yourRightsText: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:
yourRightsList: Right to access your personal data
Right to rectification of inaccurate data
Right to erasure (“right to be forgotten”)
Right to withdraw consent at any time
privacy.yourRightsContact: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at {contactEmail}.
privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies to make our website work properly. We may also use analytics and marketing cookies with your consent. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings or our cookie banner.
privacy.dataSecurityText: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.internationalTransfersText: Whenever possible, we process and store your data within the European Economic Area (EEA). If we transfer data outside the EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place (such as Standard Contractual Clauses).
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The latest version will always be available on this page, and we will update the “Last updated” date accordingly.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your personal data, please contact us at:
